story.text: Add D-14, the Taster's Clause, to the doctrine: when a node puts a choice to a peer it serves a shaped read — organized, reasoned, its pick named, the riskiest option flagged — never a raw dump of options. The active discipline behind owner-harness's 'the queue refuses to flood you'.

_note: The Taster's Clause (D-14), named and shaped by bdo 2026-06-20 over several reshaping passes — his restaurant example and casual words were the SHAPE, not the spec. Serves epic.owner-harness (already confirmed). The value gate judges the story; the merge-node lands it under the confirmed arc.
